# SadaPOS - Point of Sale Software for Retailers

SadaPOS is a premium offline and cloud-based POS (Point of Sale) system designed specifically for retailers, mobile shops, and electronic stores in Pakistan. We help businesses manage IMEIs, serials, stock, and sales efficiently.

## Core Features
- **Offline-First:** Works 24/7 without internet.
- **Auto Cloud Sync:** Syncs data automatically when back online.
- **IMEI/Serial Tracking:** Perfect for mobile and electronic businesses.
- **Inventory & Ledgers:** Smart stock management and customer ledgers.
- **Warranty/Repair:** Dedicated tracking for repairs and warranties.
